text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I'm leaving to go out on my day off, I come
across Special Week in her tracksuit.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh! Hiiiii, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Nope. I'm going to play tennis with Maruzen!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I've never played tennis before, so I'm really
excited... and a bit nervous!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Do you wanna come and watch?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I'm not going to be doing anything
impressive, but it'll be worth coming just to see
Maruzen since she's so good!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to accept Special Week's invitation and
watch their tennis match.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Okay, darlings! Time to get our heart rates up
and sweat flowing!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: All right!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
I'm ready! I can't believe I get to play tennis with
you, Maruzen!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I-I'm gonna do my best too!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Aw, you don't have to be so nervous! It's all cool
beans! Come on, Spe. Let's pair up! ♪

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Pair up? Y-you mean like be on the same team?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It's important for the two people pairing up to
trust each other.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I trust you, so I'm not worried about anything.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I trust you too, so I'm not worried either!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Now then, we need a player in the front and
another in the back. Which position do you
prefer?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
The front player needs quick reflexes, while the
back player needs stamina since they have to
guard a wide area.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Speed or stamina... Hmm, which suits me better?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer. Do you think I'd be better playing
at the front or the back?
choice_data_list: Trust your reflexes and take the front position!
Trust your stamina and take the back position!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Aw, thanks for having so much faith in me! Okay,
front position it is!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: All right, time to do this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so begins the game of tennis. However...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Reflexes up in front, lightning-fast reflexes...
Raaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Smack.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Spe... Your reflexes are the bee's knees, but you
should hit the ball with your racket—not your
face.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... I know, but I'm just not used to swinging
the racket...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week's reflexes continue to improve, but
the same can't be said for her tennis skills.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
The back position? Got it! I used to run around
the meadows back home all the time, so I know
I've got stamina!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so begins the game of tennis. However...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Maruzen's been carrying the whole game, so I
gotta return the favor by dishing out a good
serve!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Here I go... Hah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Smack.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week's serve nails Maruzensky squarely
on the back of her head.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Gaaah! I'm so, so sorry!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I expected that to happen sooner or later.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Those aren't the kinds of expectations I want you
to have!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, Special Week runs her heart out in the
back, perhaps to atone for her foul serve.
